name: Lemon Poppy Seed Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemonade, honey, salt, and lemon peel (if using) in a large bowl.
2. Add poppy seeds, vital gluten (if using), and yeast to the mixture.
3. Gradually add whole wheat flour, stirring until a soft dough forms.
4. Follow the normal bread machine instructions for mixing and baking.
